title: conosilene conica subsp. lydia
intro: Conosilene conica subsp. lydia, also known as Conyza lydia, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family and is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Conosilene conica subsp. lydia include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems, among others. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
